pending_bead_update.comment: 2026-07-22 RC mutation seal precondition recheck (advisory/background; must never block publish): PRECONDITIONS STILL NOT MET. Evidence committed at tests/artifacts/evidence/rc-mutation-seal-precondition-check.json. No RC tag/RC-era source exists (`git tag -l '*0.9.1*' '*0.10*' '*0.11*' '*rc*'` returned empty). Safety-surface churn is still not settled: 103 commits touched guard/audit/core/db/dispatch in the last 24h; after fuzz shard abe65e48 exactly one safety commit still landed (79bba6c6, 2026-07-22 12:18 +0200, dashboard 403/browser lane); after R-fail close 989b68ca there were zero further safety-surface commits, but the last one is still too recent to call this an RC seal point. No committed five-surface mutation/seal artifacts were found under tests/artifacts. Tooling is ready: `scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 180 -- bash scripts/mutation_safety_gate.sh self-test` passed, and `python3 -m py_compile scripts/migrate_mutation_result.py scripts/test_migrate_mutation_result.py` plus `python3 scripts/migrate_mutation_result.py --help` passed. `ALLOW_STALE_MUTATION_SEAL` remains the advisory/no-stall mechanism in ci/release/docker/publish paths with loud warnings. Do not close yet; when an RC-era SHA exists and safety-crate churn has settled, run the background five-surface campaign and feed complete OOM-free shard outputs plus integrity sidecars through `scripts/migrate_mutation_result.py`. No release gate should be made failing by this bead.
